title: A Thousand Locked Rooms
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When a reclusive puzzle-maker dies in a room bolted from inside with no key in sight, his estranged daughter must solve the seven elaborate puzzles he left behind—each one a locked room hiding a darker family secret.
long_description: When a reclusive puzzle-maker dies in a room bolted from inside with no key in sight, his estranged daughter must solve the seven elaborate puzzles he left behind—each one a locked room hiding a darker family secret.
